reviewEvidence.teamAttempt: gjc team ultragoal-g008-final-cleanup-a-9b660619 was launched and shut down as phase=cancelled because both worker panes failed before startup ACK with provider model 404 for claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620; native executor/architect lanes supplied final clean review evidence.

coveredBehaviors: Product import uses deterministic URL metadata, preserves valid percent signs, and blocks metadata-poor imports instead of creating generic fallback products.
ProductManager shows manual fallback only for 422 PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED responses and surfaces other import failures normally.
ShoppingConnect links support create, edit, package clearing, active-state toggle, delete, and freshness check flows.
Content generation/search placement excludes inactive ShoppingConnect products.
Performance and Company Memory category aggregation use active linked products, dedupe categories, and split direct revenue/views/click evidence.
Company Memory aggregation uses sample-count weighted averages and Hermes marks memory used only after successful new memo creation.
Product, ShoppingConnect, and draft persistence failures are not catch-all masked as not-found; only Prisma P2025 maps to null/not-found.
